---
title: ""
format: html
editor: visual
navbar: false
---

## Week 11 - Wednesday, April 22nd

### Class Objectives

1.  30 MIN : Look over a research article.
2.  20 MIN : Look at some Dig Deeper assignments.
3.  40 MIN : Get started on the final project (!!!)

### Class Slides

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/rm/slides/10_samplebias.html" width=100% height="400px"></iframe>
```

### Useful Links

-   **CHECK-IN : refugee study**
-   [Dig Deeper](/rm/notes/digdeeper.qmd)
-   Final Project
-   [Vision Board](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14u3w5edvo6KSFRw2U9t1knDANFSGBWOvDjS7-ZGujos/edit?usp=sharing)

## Before Next Class

### Um.
